first_llm_json: {"simulation_goal_structured": "Reduce average cycle time by 20% while maintaining quality", "kpis": [{"name": "Cycle Time", "category": "time", "target_direction": "minimize", "process_scope": "end_to_end", "suggested_formula": "avg(case_end - case_start)"}, {"name": "Quality Score", "category": "quality", "target_direction": "maintain", "process_scope": "end_to_end", "suggested_formula": "1 - (rework_cases / total_cases)"}], "reasoning": "Focus on cycle time reduction without degrading quality"}
